response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r1c5 is 0.10 below threshold (0.15 SoC frac), within policy bounds; offering 0.15 kW/tick aligns with balanced sharing to prevent cascading collapse while maintaining self-preservation at 33.9% SoC.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r1c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded SoC 33.9% declining ~1.6 kWh/h. Neighbors critically depleted (<2% SoC) and rejecting all transfers. Conditional policy (4-tick window) has expired without reconnection signal. Shift to balanced sharing: offer 0.15 kW/tick to stabilize neighbors and prevent cascading collapse. Self-preservation threshold lowered to 25% to enable mutual survival..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
